mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ev_charger (cs_id, cp_id, cp_nm, charge_tp, cp_tp, cp_stat, stat_update_datetime, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{c.csId}, #{c.cpId}, #{c.cpNm}, #{c.chargeTp}, #{c.cpTp}, #{c.cpStat}, #{c.statUpdateDatetime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cp_nm = VALUES(cp_nm), charge_tp = VALUES(charge_tp), cp_tp = VALUES(cp_tp), cp_stat = VALUES(cp_stat), stat_update_datetime = VALUES(stat_update_datetime), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO ev_charger (cs_id, cp_id, cp_stat, stat_update_datetime, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{c.csId}, #{c.cpId}, #{c.cpStat}, #{c.statUpdateDatetime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cp_stat = VALUES(cp_stat), stat_update_datetime = VALUES(stat_update_datetime), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
